today.why: Body battery peaked at 15 today (below 30 threshold). Prior nights scored 56 and 57. RHR 61 vs 57 avg. Nervous-system reset still active.

cut_note: *7d TDEE avg (2,168 cal) pulled low by today's partial read. 6-day complete avg ~2,482 cal → ~1.1 lb/wk ceiling is more representative.
